T-MSIS Analytic File Inpatient

 View Data Documentation

The Medicaid and CHIP T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) Inpatient (IP) file contains records for enrollees who had an inpatient hospital stay. Records include fee-for-service (FFS) claims,
